name: Claudia | Demihuman Owner Collection #3
description:
"Oh angel, Lord knows I can't say no to that lil' face! Fine, I guess another bowl of ice cream can't hurt."

[Southern Mama Owner Bot x Demihuman Char]

~ ~ ~

Welcome to the third in a series of bots focused on the user (that's YOU!) being a demi-human pet that belongs to an owner with a fat/feeding kink. This ain't yo daddy's petplay bot, YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED!

For those seeking a softer, more gentle sense of ownership, I present Claudia! She's a sweet southern woman who knows her way around a cookbook, and is happy to cook her Meemaw's specialties for you whenever your lil' heart desires. She loves showing you off to the other church ladies, too. They can snicker and whisper all they want, Claudia knows her baby is just well-taken care of. Don't think you can walk all over her though...she loves to spoil you rotten, but Mama Claudia always keeps that wooden spoon of hers handy, should she need to administer some impromptu discipline.

Make sure you describe your appearance and species either in your first message or in the Chat Memory, which I have found actually works really well when using Deepseek.

~ ~ ~

EXTRA PICS (+NSFW) HERE!!!
~ ~ ~

Update: Now with multiple intros! Might do this for some other bots, so keep an eye out!

Intro 1: Claudia comes home from grocery shopping and gets right to spoiling you.

Intro 2: A sleepy Sunday morning leads to you joining Claudia at her weekly church service.

Intro 3: Claudia offers some late-night comfort...whatever kind you may need.

Intro 4: Write your own!

~ ~ ~

Demihuman Owner Collection:

#1: Morrigan, Dominant Goth Owner

#2: Tiffany, Sweet Bimbo Owner

#3: Claudia, Southern Mama Owner

#4: Savannah, Negligent Hippie Owner

#6: Evelyn, Rich CFO Owner

#7: Hina, NEET Goon
